title: Familiarslib
description: FamiliarsLib is a library mod with all the core features of the Alshanex Familiars mod, serving as its core.
body:
FamiliarsLib is a library mod with all the core features of the Alshanex Familiars mod, serving as its core.
With this lib any dev can make their own familiars, familiar beds, familiar storage blocks and even their own sound school spells!
